description.from: Deals 304*(1+0.3Skill Level)+192.2% of Attack Power as Physical Damage to enemies within range 2 times. The first hit knocks enemies down for 1.8 sec and reduces their Defense Penetration by 300 for 4 sec.
description.to: Deals ??? P.DMG to enemies within range, and the first attack knocks them down for 3 sec and reduces their DEF Penetration by 250 for 10 sec.

description.from: Removes all harmful effects from all allies and increases their Attack by 252(1+0.3Skill Level), Attack Speed by 36%, and Physical Defense by 91(1+0.3Skill Level) for 6 sec.
description.to: All allies' ATK is increased by ???, ATK Spd by 300 and P.DEF by ??? for 15 sec. Upon activation, dispels all negative effects from allies.

description.from: Charges forward and deals 161(1+0.3Skill Level)+80.9% of Attack Power as Physical Damage 12 times to nearby enemies. Cannot be affected by status ailments while casting, and the final hit freezes enemies for 2.4 sec.
description.to: Deals ??? P.DMG over 12 times to nearby enemies within a circular range of self and draws them in while use. While using the Skill, gains immunity to CC. The last attack freezes the enemy for 4 sec.

description.from: Every second, Attack increases by 16(1+0.3Skill Level), Status Resistance by 30, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies by 1.5%. This effect stacks up to 20 times. At 20 or more stacks, Normal Attack damage increases by 100%.
description.to: Increases own ATK by ???, CC resist by 30, and DMG to Non-Hero enemies by 1.5% every sec. This effect can be stacked up to max 20 times. At 20 stacks or more, increases DMG of normal attacks by 100%.

IV.from: Draws in nearby enemies while casting.
Status Resistance increases by 30 per stack.

dark.from: During the duration, Attack Speed is additionally increased by 24%.
dark.to: ATK Spd boost of 200 is added to the effect.

description.from: [Smash] reduces the target’s ATK by 25% and increases the P.DMG they take by {0}% for 10 sec.
description.to: [Smash] Reduces the target's ATK by 20% and increases P.DMG target receives by {0}% for 10 sec.

description.from: [Battle Roar] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases targets' Crit DMG by {0}% for the duration of Skill.
description.to: [Battle Roar] Reduces Mana Cost by 1 and increases target's Crit DMG by {0}% for the duration of Skill.

description.from: [Vortex] increases DMG by 50%, and its last hit increases the P.DMG the target takes by {0}% for 10 sec.
description.to: [Vortex] DMG is increased by 50%, and the last hit increases All DMG the target takes by {0}% for 10 sec.

description.from: Max HP increases by {0}%, and Normal Attacks have a 15% chance to deal additional Physical Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power and freeze the target for 2 sec.
description.to: Increases own Max HP by {0}%. Normal attacks have a 15% chance of dealing additional P.DMG equal to {1}% of ATK and freezing them for 2 sec.
